form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: Making minority party appointments for the 110th Congress.

section.text: That the following be the minority membership on the following committee for the remainder of the 110th Congress, or until their successors are appointed:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Lugar, Mr. Hagel, Mr. Coleman, Mr. Corker, Mr. Voinovich, Ms. Murkowski, Mr. DeMint, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Vitter, and Mr. Barrasso.
